content: Remote OK Social Media Coordinator House of Ruh <p>House of Ruh is looking for a creative Social Media Coordinator.</p><p><br></p><p>Rooted between Jaipur | NYC, House of Ruh is a lifestyle brand <span>bringing together artisan craft, intentional design, and modern everyday pieces</span>. <span>As we get ready to introduce House of Ruh to the world, we are looking for someone who can help translate the brand into a strong, beautiful, and engaging social presence.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span>This is a creative, collaborative role for someone who gets excited about building a people.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span>The ideal person has:</span></p><ul><li><span>Experience creating or managing content for lifestyle, fashion, home, beauty, hospitality, or culturally rooted brands</span></li><li><span>A strong visual eye and understanding of elevated social media aesthetics</span></li><li><span>Ability to plan content, not just post it</span></li><li><span>Bringing creative strategy, organization, and strong follow-through</span></li><li><span>Bonus: NYC/NJ/JAIPUR-based and able to help capture content </span></li></ul><p><br></p><p>Contract, stipend-based to start with potential to grow. </p><p><br></p><p>If interested, email hello@houseofruh.com with your portfolio or brands/accounts youâve worked on and content youâve created.</p> education, Contract July to November.</strong></p><p><br></p><p>We are seeking a highly organized and adaptable Learning &amp; Development Specialist to provide temporary coverage during a maternity leave. This role will support learning initiatives, training administration, content organization, and learning program execution. The ideal candidate is a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can manage multiple priorities, and consistently drives projects to completion.</p><p><br></p><p>Key Responsibilities</p><ul><li>Support the administration and coordination of learning and development programs.</li><li>Maintain and update training matrices, learning records, and training documentation.</li><li>Assist with learning management system (LMS) activities and learning operations.</li><li>Organize, track, and manage learning-related projects to ensure deadlines are met.</li><li>Curate and refine existing content into learner-friendly formats.</li><li>Create and edit PowerPoint presentations, training materials, content outlines, and job aids.</li><li>Summarize complex information into clear, concise learning content.</li><li>Collaborate with stakeholders to gather information and support learning initiatives.</li><li>Monitor project timelines and proactively identify and resolve obstacles.</li></ul><p><br></p><p>Qualifications</p><ul><li>Experience supporting Learning &amp; Development, Training, Organizational Development, or Talent Development functions.</li><li>2-4 years of experience</li><li>Experience working with Learning Management Systems (LMS); Workday Learning experience is a plus but not required.</li><li>Strong project coordination and organizational skills.</li><li>Experience maintaining training matrices and learning documentation.</li><li>Ability to create, edit, and refine presentation materials and learning content.</li><li>Strong written communication skills with the ability to summarize information effectively.</li><li>Comfortable working independently with limited direction.</li><li>Demonstrated ability to manage shifting priorities and changing business needs.</li></ul><p><br></p><p>Desired Traits</p><ul><li>Highly organized and detail-oriented.</li><li>Strong follow-through and execution skills.</li><li>Agile and adaptable when priorities change.</li><li>Resourceful problem solver.</li><li>Self-directed learner with a proactive approach.</li><li>Positive attitude and ability to work effectively in a remote environment.</li></ul><p><br></p> hr, virtual assistant, exec Houston, Houston, Texas, United States 2026-06-11T03:40:21+00:00 1133192
